task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero application, the left sidebar (collections pane) should display a folder/collection named exactly 'Reproducibility Data'.

task_completion.description: Create a 'Computer Program' item for Scikit-learn
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the middle pane (items list), there should be an item titled 'Scikit-learn' with the specific icon denoting a Computer Program (usually a terminal/code icon).

task_completion.description: Enter the required metadata for the Scikit-learn item
task_completion.visual_evidence: When 'Scikit-learn' is selected, the right-hand Info pane must show: Item Type as 'Computer Program', Version as '1.0.2', System as 'Python', URL as 'https://scikit-learn.org', and Company/Publisher as 'Scikit-learn Developers'.

task_completion.description: Create a 'Dataset' item for MNIST Database
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the middle pane (items list), there should be an item titled 'MNIST Database' with the specific icon denoting a Dataset.

task_completion.description: Enter the required metadata for the MNIST Database item
task_completion.visual_evidence: When 'MNIST Database' is selected, the right-hand Info pane must show: Item Type as 'Dataset', Date as '1998', Repository as 'Courant Institute', and URL as 'http://yann.lecun.com/exdb/mnist/'.

task_completion.description: Both items are located inside the 'Reproducibility Data' collection
task_completion.visual_evidence: While the 'Reproducibility Data' collection is highlighted in the left sidebar, both 'Scikit-learn' and 'MNIST Database' are visible in the middle pane's item list.

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero graphical user interface to create the items
integrity.visual_evidence: The Zotero application window is visible in the screenshots with menus, panes, and dialog boxes being actively used.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or scripts (e.g., Python scripts modifying the Zotero SQLite database directly) are visible being used to complete the task.

integrity.description: The items were genuinely created in the reference manager, not just typed into a text editor or searched in a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata fields are filled out in the actual Zotero Info pane on the right side of the application, rather than just appearing as text in a browser or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using Zotero. Collection Name: 'Reproducibility Data'. Item 1: Type: 'Computer Program', Title: 'Scikit-learn', Version: '1.0.2', System: 'Python', URL: 'https://scikit-learn.org', Company/Publisher: 'Scikit-learn Developers'. Item 2: Type: 'Dataset', Title: 'MNIST Database', Date: '1998', Repository: 'Courant Institute', URL: 'http://yann.lecun.com/exdb/mnist/'.
